ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
title: Create order succeeds when order date, customer, and one line item are provided
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Sales_User and has create permission on Order Management.
Customer record exists with Customer ID CUST-10045 and name John Smith.
Product record exists with Product Code SKU-1001 and description Wireless Mouse.
Order number sequence is available for new order creation.
test_data: Line Item 1: Product Code SKU-1001, Quantity 2, Unit Price 25.00
steps: Open the Create Order screen.
Enter order date 2026-04-13.
Select customer CUST-10045.
Add line item SKU-1001 with quantity 2 and unit price 25.00.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Order is created successfully. A new order number is displayed. The saved order contains order date 2026-04-13, customer CUST-10045, and one line item for SKU-1001.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage

ac_text: Invalid product codes must be rejected.

steps: Open the create order screen.

ac_text: Invalid product codes must be rejected.

ac_text: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
title: Unauthorized user cannot submit an order with an invalid product code
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.

steps: Submit the create-order API request using the Read_Only_User credentials.
Capture the API response.
Query the order persistence store for any order created from the request.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. The response body indicates access is denied. No validation processing for product code occurs and no order record is created.

ac_text: Invalid product codes must be rejected.

steps: Submit the create-order API request with the overlong product code P-12345678901234567890.
Capture the API response.
Query the order header and order line tables for any inserted rows.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. The response body contains a product code length validation error. No rows are inserted into the order header or order line tables.

ac_text: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
title: Tax is calculated for a standard taxable product in the order API
preconditions: Application is deployed in the UAT environment and the Order Management API is accessible.
User account exists with role Sales_User and has create permission on Order Management.
Tax configuration is enabled for jurisdiction US-CA with tax rate 8.25%.
Customer record exists with Customer ID CUST-10045 and shipping address 100 Market St, San Francisco, CA 94105.
Product record exists with Product Code TAX-1001, product name Standard Taxable Widget, taxable flag set to true, and unit price 100.00 USD.
steps: Submit a create-order API request with the specified customer, order date, and taxable line item.
Capture the order creation response payload.
Query the created order by the returned order identifier.
expected_result: HTTP 201 is returned. The response contains the created order with line item tax calculated at 16.50 USD for the taxable product. The persisted order record stores tax amount 16.50 USD and total amount 216.50 USD.

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

ac_text: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
title: Blank status value does not bypass cancelled-to-shipped restriction
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Operations_User and permission Order Status Update.
Order record exists with Order ID ORD-20482 and current status Cancelled.
Status update form is configured to require a non-blank target status value.
steps: Open the order status update form for Order ID ORD-20482.
Enter a blank value in the target status field.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Inline validation error is displayed for the target status field. No status change request is accepted. Order ID ORD-20482 remains in Cancelled status.
tags: Valid transition blocked by business rule enforcement

ac_text: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
title: Cancelled order remains blocked from shipping status update
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Operations_User and permission Order Status Update.
Order record exists with Order ID ORD-20481, Customer ID CUST-10045, and current status Cancelled.
Order status transition rules are enabled and configured to prevent Cancelled to Shipped transitions.
steps: Submit a status update request for Order ID ORD-20481 with status Shipped.
Retrieve the order details for Order ID ORD-20481.
expected_result: HTTP 409 is returned for the status update request. Response body contains the business rule message indicating cancelled orders cannot move to shipped. Order ID ORD-20481 remains in Cancelled status in the persisted record.
tags: Valid transition blocked by business rule enforcement

ac_text: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
title: Whitespace-only status input is rejected for cancelled order
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Operations_User and permission Order Status Update.
Order record exists with Order ID ORD-20483 and current status Cancelled.
API input normalization trims leading and trailing whitespace before status validation.
steps: Submit a status update request for Order ID ORD-20483 with a whitespace-only status value.
Retrieve the order details for Order ID ORD-20483.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains a field-level validation error for status. Order ID ORD-20483 remains in Cancelled status and no Shipped transition is recorded.
tags: Valid transition blocked by business rule enforcement

ac_text: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
title: Malformed status value is rejected before transition logic runs
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Operations_User and permission Order Status Update.
Order record exists with Order ID ORD-20484 and current status Cancelled.
API accepts only predefined status values: New, Processing, Packed, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled.
steps: Submit a status update request for Order ID ORD-20484 with status SHIP-123.
Retrieve the order details for Order ID ORD-20484.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains an invalid status value error. Order ID ORD-20484 remains in Cancelled status and no downstream status transition event is created.
tags: Valid transition blocked by business rule enforcement

ac_text: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
title: Authorized user still cannot ship a cancelled order
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Operations_User and permission Order Status Update.
Order record exists with Order ID ORD-20485 and current status Cancelled.
Authorization is valid for the user and the order belongs to the same tenant.
steps: Submit a status update request for Order ID ORD-20485 with status Shipped.
Retrieve the order audit history for Order ID ORD-20485.
expected_result: HTTP 409 is returned. Response body indicates the cancelled-to-shipped transition is not allowed. Order ID ORD-20485 remains in Cancelled status and the audit history records the rejected attempt.
tags: Valid transition blocked by business rule enforcement

ac_text: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
title: Unauthenticated request is denied before cancelled-to-shipped validation
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
No authenticated session exists for the request.
Order record exists with Order ID ORD-20486 and current status Cancelled.
API requires a valid access token for order status updates.
steps: Submit a status update request for Order ID ORD-20486 without an access token.
Retrieve the order details for Order ID ORD-20486.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body indicates authentication is required. Order ID ORD-20486 remains in Cancelled status and no status transition is processed.
tags: Valid transition blocked by business rule enforcement

ac_text: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
title: Cross-tenant attempt to ship a cancelled order is blocked
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Operations_User and permission Order Status Update for Tenant T-100.
Order record exists with Order ID ORD-20487, Tenant T-200, and current status Cancelled.
API enforces tenant isolation on order status updates.
steps: Submit a status update request for Order ID ORD-20487 with status Shipped using the Tenant T-100 user context.
Retrieve the order details for Order ID ORD-20487.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body indicates access is denied due to tenant isolation. Order ID ORD-20487 remains in Cancelled status and no cross-tenant update is persisted.
tags: Valid transition blocked by business rule enforcement
